tagline: Screens patients and runs monitoring — the PI / medical monitor signs eligibility and safety calls.
problem: Trial operations — eligibility screening, source-data verification, reg-doc assembly — are slow, manual and Part 11 / GCP-validated, gating the cost and speed of every study.
outcome: Patients are screened and matched, data abstracted and deviations flagged, and reg packages assembled straight-through; the PI / medical monitor signs eligibility and safety decisions.

steps.does: Ingest the protocol and patient records from the EHR
Screen and match eligible patients and abstract source data
Flag protocol deviations and assemble the monitoring / regulatory package
The PI / medical monitor signs eligibility and any safety determination
Enroll the patient and submit the regulatory documents (Part 11)
Monitor safety signals and maintain the eTMF
